description:
Secure remote access and support

TeamViewer is a comprehensive, remote access, remote control and remote support solution that works with almost every desktop and mobile platform, including Windows, macOS, Android, and iOS.
TeamViewer lets you remote in to computers or mobile devices located anywhere in the world and use them as though you were there.
New Features

Improvements
- For devices that exist in both the modern (MDv2) and legacy (MDv1) systems, policy changes can be made only to the modern (MDv2) managed device entry ensuring consistent behavior regarding policy assignments on the (MDv2) managed devices.

Bugfixes
- The Easy Access connection option now remains visible and enabled even when no device is selected.
- The date range filter on the connection report page now remains after a page refresh.
- Fixed an issue where the device status was inconsistent between the device list page and the global search list view.
- Fixed an issue where the Join button was unresponsive for the supporter when the end user had already started a remote session.
